-1004.title: Universal Periodic Review – Summary Reports (Stakeholder Information)
-1004.description: Summary of stakeholders' information prepared by OHCHR for the Universal Periodic Review.

-1002.title: Universal Periodic Review – Working Group Reports
-1002.description: Reports of the Working Group on the Universal Periodic Review containing recommendations.

-1001.title: Universal Periodic Review – National Reports
-1001.description: National reports submitted by States under review as part of the Universal Periodic Review process.

-1000.title: Universal Periodic Review – Compilation Reports (UN Information)
-1000.description: Compilation of UN information prepared by OHCHR for the Universal Periodic Review.

0.title: UN Human Rights Treaty Submissions
0.description: This cluster comprises reports submitted by states under various UN human rights treaties, detailing their adherence and implementation of the conventions through periodic reviews conducted by treaty bodies.

1.title: State Party Reports to UN Committees
1.description: These reports represent official submissions by state parties to various UN human rights bodies, including periodic and common core documents, detailing compliance with international human rights instruments.

2.title: Country Periodic Reports to UN Committees
2.description: This cluster contains periodic reports submitted by Australia and Ireland to various UN treaty bodies, fulfilling their obligations under international human rights conventions.

3.title: Periodic Reports on Core Human Rights Treaties
3.description: This cluster includes periodic reports submitted by various nations to United Nations treaty bodies, detailing compliance and implementation of obligations under international human rights conventions, including CEDAW and ICCPR.

4.title: Periodic Reports on Covenant Implementation
4.description: The reports in this cluster are periodic submissions to the Committee on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights by state parties, detailing their adherence to and implementation of obligations under articles 16 and 17 of the International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights.

5.title: Periodic Reports on Human Rights Covenants
5.description: These reports represent submissions by various nations under the International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights (ICESCR), and the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR), providing updates on their adherence to and implementation of the respective treaty obligations.

6.title: Periodic Reports on Treaty Implementation
6.description: This cluster contains periodic reports submitted by member states regarding their implementation and compliance with international treaties, analyzed by corresponding UN treaty bodies.

7.title: Canadian Compliance with UN Human Rights Conventions
7.description: This cluster encompasses reports detailing Canada's obligations, evaluations, and feedback regarding its adherence to various United Nations human rights treaties and agreements. They include both periodic submissions by Canada and assessments by UN special rapporteurs and working groups.

8.title: Country Reports on Covenant Compliance
8.description: These reports detail compliance by Chile and Peru with the International Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights, as reviewed by the Committee on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights.

9.title: Periodical State Reports to UN Treaties
9.description: This cluster comprises periodic reports submitted by states to various UN treaty bodies, detailing compliance with international human rights obligations as prescribed by specific conventions.

10.title: State Party Reports under UN Human Rights Bodies
10.description: This cluster consists of periodic and initial reports submitted by State Parties under various United Nations human rights treaties. These documents provide updates on the implementation and compliance with the respective conventions and covenants.

11.title: Reports on Indigenous Rights and Participation
11.description: This cluster comprises United Nations reports addressing the rights, status, and participation of Indigenous Peoples globally. Topics include efforts to implement declarations, expert mechanism findings, specific country reports, and participation in UN processes.

12.title: Periodic Reports on Covenant and Convention Compliance
12.description: This cluster includes reports submitted by member states, specifically Hong Kong, China, and Singapore, outlining their compliance efforts and progress related to international human rights covenants and conventions, as required periodically by the respective UN committees.

13.title: Periodical Reports by Indonesia to UN
13.description: These reports represent periodic submissions by Indonesia to various United Nations committees and treaty bodies, detailing the nation's commitments under several international conventions and covenants.

14.title: Reports on Covenant Compliance and Slavery
14.description: This cluster includes reports addressing compliance with the Covenant on Economic, Social and Cultural Rights and investigations into contemporary forms of slavery, focusing on incarcerated individuals.

15.title: Member States' Periodic Compliance Reports
15.description: This cluster consists of periodic reports submitted by member states under various UN conventions and covenants, focusing on the implementation and compliance with their obligations related to human rights and anti-discrimination measures.

16.title: Periodic UN Human Rights Reports
16.description: This cluster comprises periodic reports submitted by Central Asian and Eastern European nations to various UN human rights bodies under treaty obligations, detailing progress and compliance with conventions like ICERD, CRC, and others.

17.title: Periodic Reports Submitted by State Parties
17.description: This cluster comprises periodic reports submitted by various state parties to respective UN human rights treaties, outlining their compliance and implementation of the provisions outlined in the treaties.

18.title: Periodic Reports to UN Treaty Bodies
18.description: This cluster contains periodic reports submitted by nations to various UN treaty bodies in compliance with the corresponding human rights conventions and protocols. They address country-specific implementations and measures aligning with international human rights obligations.

19.title: Periodic State Compliance Reports by Nations
19.description: This cluster encompasses periodic state reports submitted to various UN treaty bodies, detailing the implementation and compliance with international conventions and covenants, such as the Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women and the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights.

20.title: Periodic Reports Submitted by Pakistan
20.description: This cluster comprises various periodic reports submitted by Pakistan to United Nations committees and treaty bodies, as required under specific international human rights treaties and protocols.

21.title: State Party Periodic Reports Submission
21.description: This cluster comprises periodic state party reports submitted to various UN treaty bodies in compliance with international conventions, detailing the implementation of respective treaty obligations over specified reporting periods.

22.title: Reports Submitted by States Parties
22.description: This cluster includes reports submitted by States parties in accordance with international obligations under human rights treaties, focusing on economic, social, and cultural rights as well as core documents providing fundamental contextual information on implementation of these treaties.

23.title: Periodic Reports Submitted by the Netherlands
23.description: This cluster contains periodic state reports submitted by the Netherlands to various international human rights treaty bodies. These reports outline the country's compliance with its obligations under specific human rights treaties.

24.title: State Periodic Reports to UN Committees
24.description: This cluster consists of periodic reports submitted by member states under the obligations of various United Nations human rights treaties, covering compliance and implementation of treaty provisions.

25.title: United Kingdom Periodic Reports
25.description: This cluster comprises periodic reports submitted by the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland to various UN committees as part of its obligations under human rights treaties.

26.title: State Party Periodic Reports to UN Bodies
26.description: This cluster consists of periodic and initial reports submitted by States Parties under various UN human rights treaties. These reports detail the progress, measures taken, and compliance with treaty obligations, facilitating treaty bodies' assessments through periodic reviews.

27.title: Follow-up Reports on Individual Communications
27.description: This cluster contains follow-up progress reports prepared by various UN committees under the human rights treaty system, focusing on the examination and resolution of individual communications submitted to these committees.

28.title: Quadrennial Reports by NGOs to ECOSOC
28.description: The cluster consists of quadrennial reports submitted by non-governmental organizations maintaining consultative status with the UN Economic and Social Council, detailing their activities and compliance during specified four-year periods, as required by Council resolution 1996/31.

29.title: UN Reports on Ethics and Oversight
29.description: This cluster gathers United Nations official documents focusing on ethics, audit, investigation activities, and internal oversight across various UN agencies. It includes annual reports, office activities, committee reviews, and compliance updates.

30.title: Corrigenda of UN Organizational Reports
30.description: This cluster contains corrigenda of various United Nations reports submitted by organizational bodies such as UNDP, UNOPS, and UNFPA, addressing corrections, updates, or clarifications to previously distributed documents.

31.title: UN Reports on Health and Development
31.description: This cluster comprises United Nations reports focusing on health initiatives, gender equality, economic progress, Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), and strategies to combat diseases and global challenges, reflecting efforts in implementing strategic plans and addressing inequalities.

32.title: Reports on United Nations Evaluation Functions
32.description: This cluster encompasses reports detailing evaluations and reviews of various United Nations entities' functions, initiatives, and performance, submitted for organizational accountability and improvement.

33.title: Annual and Strategic UN Development Reports
33.description: This cluster compiles reports from various UN entities detailing their annual achievements, strategic plan implementations, and reviews of global programs, focusing on development, gender equality, disaster management, and sustainable governance.

34.title: UN Administrative and Financial Program Reports
34.description: This cluster collects reports and documents related to administrative, financial management, audit, and budgeting processes across various United Nations entities for multiple years.

35.title: United Nations System Accountability Reports
35.description: This cluster encompasses reports focused on accountability, assessment, and management practices within the United Nations System, including evaluations of organizational frameworks, program implementation, and risk management.

36.title: UN Reports on Humanitarian Assistance
36.description: Reports encompassing UN efforts in providing humanitarian assistance, coordination, and resolution implementations in response to global crises and conflicts.

37.title: United Nations Financial and Programmatic Reports
37.description: The reports in this cluster analyze and document the financial performance, auditing, and progress evaluation of initiatives and funds managed by various United Nations entities, based on the latest fiscal year or strategic frameworks.

38.title: Reports on UNCDF Achievements and Activities
38.description: This cluster comprises reports documenting the results and reviews of the United Nations Capital Development Fund (UNCDF), including an outline of achieved goals and strategic reviews, spanning various years.

39.title: Environmental and Sustainable Development Reports
39.description: This cluster contains reports addressing global issues related to environmental sustainability, human security, water resources, and international cooperation frameworks, emphasizing actions and plans for sustainable development.

40.title: UN Reports on Fundraising and Volunteering
40.description: This cluster includes UN reports detailing activities and financial statuses of private fundraising, partnerships, and volunteering initiatives, highlighting their collective efforts towards UN goals.

41.title: Reports on Governance and Oversight
41.description: This cluster comprises reports addressing issues of program oversight, internal auditing, implementation of recommendations, and financial reviews across various United Nations entities and programs.

42.title: UN Operational and Development Reports
42.description: This cluster contains reports and documents generated by various UN entities, including operational reviews, session summaries, and thematic analyses, focused on organizational, developmental, and administrative activities.

43.title: United Nations Financial and Administrative Reports
43.description: This cluster of reports focuses on financial and administrative topics including budgetary questions, health insurance management, peacebuilding investments, and the financial situation of the UN, reflecting a detailed analysis of resource management.

44.title: Country Reports on Regional Development
44.description: This cluster includes country reports provided by Mozambique and Cape Verde, describing national contexts and developments regarding administrative and regional specifics.

45.title: Regional Member State Reports Summary
45.description: This cluster contains reports submitted by member states and regional groups providing summaries of national initiatives, policies, and activities across various sectors.

46.title: Geographical Names Standardization Reports
46.description: This cluster comprises reports submitted by various countries and regional bodies to present their activities and developments related to the standardization of geographical names, following protocols recognized by United Nations expert groups.

47.title: United Nations Geographical Names Reports
47.description: This cluster includes reports related to the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names (UNGEGN) detailing activities, achievements, and analysis from various working divisions, member states, and sessions focusing on toponymy and geographical naming standards.

48.title: Reports on Geographical Naming Conventions
48.description: These reports focus on the discussions and documentation presented during sessions of the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names, detailing contributions from specific countries and regional divisions regarding geographical nomenclature.

49.title: Reports on Geographical Names Standardization
49.description: This cluster encompasses official reports submitted by various nations and divisions to the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names. These documents detail activities, updates, and progress made in geographic name standardization conducted during specific periods.

50.title: UN Documents on Geographical Names Reports
50.description: This cluster consists of country and division reports submitted to the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names (UNGEGN), summarizing contributions and activities from various sessions held between 2021 and 2025.

51.title: Reports on UN Group of Experts Activities
51.description: These reports document contributions to and summaries from the 2023 session of the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names, with a specific focus on Canadian and USA-Canada Division participation.

52.title: Scandinavian Countries' National Reports
52.description: A collection of reports submitted by Scandinavian nations outlining their national perspectives or activities within the framework of United Nations platforms.

53.title: Reports Related to Finland's Geographical Names
53.description: This cluster includes reports presented by Finland concerning geographical naming standards, toponymic guidelines, and summaries provided to the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names.

54.title: Geographical Name Standardization Reports
54.description: These reports document the activities, summaries, and contributions of Italy and the Romano-Hellenic Division in the context of sessions held by the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names, focusing on geographical name standardization.

55.title: Reports on Geographical Names Discussions
55.description: This cluster contains summaries and submissions of reports discussed during the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names sessions from member states and divisions, covering topics and updates on geographical name standardization.

56.title: Reports on Geographical Naming Initiatives
56.description: This cluster comprises reports submitted by New Zealand, focusing on activities related to geographical naming, including alignment with UN strategic plans and the promotion of traditional Māori names.

57.title: Geographical Names and Africa-focused Coordination
57.description: This cluster of reports centers around UN initiatives and discussions regarding standardization, management, and advisory activities pertaining to geographical names, including a specific focus on the cooperation efforts of the Task Team for Africa.

58.title: Geospatial Information Management Reports
58.description: These reports collectively focus on topics related to global geospatial information management, including toponymic guidelines and collaborative efforts in cartography and geographical naming conventions.

59.title: Global Geospatial and Geographical Names Reports
59.description: These reports relate to the activities, sessions, and outcomes of the United Nations Committee of Experts on Global Geospatial Information Management and the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names, focusing on the management, standardization, and evaluation of geospatial and geographical names information globally.

60.title: Collaborative Reports on Geographic Research
60.description: These reports document findings and collaborative efforts within global geographic and hydrographic research, including Antarctic exploration and systematic methodologies.

61.title: Reports on ICANN Activities and Summary
61.description: These reports provide summaries of activities, developments, and information related to the Internet Corporation for Assigned Names and Numbers (ICANN), presented or submitted in alignment with United Nations engagements.

62.title: Reports on Geographical Naming Standards
62.description: These reports cover activities and outcomes related to international geographical naming practices, addressing toponymy and exonyms.

63.title: Reports on Collaboration with ICOS
63.description: These reports provide summaries of activities and interactions by the Liaison Officer with the International Council of Onomastic Sciences (ICOS), highlighting joint initiatives and findings.

64.title: Romanization Systems for Geographical Names
64.description: This cluster contains reports by the Working Group on Romanization Systems, providing summaries on the current status of United Nations romanization systems for geographical names, which concern the transcription of non-Latin scripts into Roman letters.

65.title: Reports by UNGEGN Working Groups
65.description: This cluster includes reports provided by Working Groups under the United Nations Group of Experts on Geographical Names (UNGEGN), focusing on their activities, initiatives, and contributions to toponymy education, publicity, and funding.

66.title: Reports on the Rights of Older Persons
66.description: This cluster of reports focuses on the rights, welfare, and protection of older persons, including in diverse global contexts and under the Madrid International Plan of Action on Ageing, 2002.

67.title: Secretary-General Reports: Corrigenda Updates
67.description: This cluster consists of corrigenda to various reports by the UN Secretary-General, addressing amendments and updates to prior submissions on topics such as aging, population, financial resources, social development, and open data.

68.title: Reports on Global Statistical Systems
68.description: This cluster encompasses various reports related to statistics and data management, including expert group findings, census implementations, demographic surveys, and statistical commission activities, outlining methodologies, implementations, and progress.

69.title: Advancing Gender Equality and Women's Rights
69.description: These reports focus on global efforts to achieve gender equality and empower women and girls, covering topics such as policy frameworks, human rights, violence prevention, and sustainable development.

70.title: Global Population and Sustainable Development
70.description: Reports addressing population trends, actions, and their ties to sustainable development goals within global development frameworks.

71.title: Reports on Statistical Development Initiatives
71.description: This cluster encompasses reports concerning the development, implementation, and coordination of statistical methodologies, infrastructures, and thematic analyses to support global and regional progress assessment, including the Sustainable Development Goals.

72.title: Advancing Sustainable Development and Social Protection
72.description: The reports in this cluster collectively address key aspects of achieving sustainable development goals, focusing particularly on social protection, health, and measures to reduce inequalities globally.

73.title: Statistical Coordination and Best Practices Reports
73.description: These reports pertain to UN efforts in coordinating and enhancing statistical methodologies and frameworks across various committees and expert groups to ensure consistency, quality, and dissemination of official statistics.

74.title: Rights of Persons with Disabilities
74.description: This cluster comprises reports focusing on the rights, inclusion, and well-being of persons with disabilities, adhering to the frameworks of the Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities and other relevant mechanisms promoting equality and human rights.

75.title: Financial Resources for Population Programme
75.description: These reports focus on the allocation and flow of financial resources aimed at facilitating the progress of the Programme of Action established during the International Conference on Population and Development.

76.title: Human Rights and Emerging Digital Technologies
76.description: This cluster addresses the impact and implications of digital and emerging technologies on various aspects of human rights, focusing on themes such as privacy, gender equality, countering discrimination, and the use of these technologies in governance and social justice initiatives.

77.title: Sustainable Development and Biodiversity Reports
77.description: This cluster encompasses reports focusing on international frameworks and agreements aimed at advancing the implementation, monitoring, and support of sustainable development goals and biodiversity conservation efforts.

78.title: Youth and Peacebuilding Initiatives
78.description: This cluster encompasses reports from the United Nations focused on global efforts to engage youth, foster peace, and promote interreligious and intercultural dialogue for sustainable development and conflict resolution.

79.title: Food Security and Sustainable Development
79.description: This cluster comprises UN reports addressing food security, nutrition, agricultural development, and their intersections with sustainable development goals, climate action, and human rights. These documents provide frameworks and analysis for achieving equitable and stable food systems.

80.title: Human Rights in Conflict Zones
80.description: This cluster focuses on reports addressing human rights concerns and capacity-building efforts in areas affected by conflict or post-conflict scenarios, emphasizing protection for vulnerable groups, including women, children, and civilians, as well as targeted technical assistance.

81.title: Coordination of UN Development Initiatives
81.description: This cluster encompasses reports addressing the United Nations' efforts and programs aimed at sustainable development through partnerships, innovation, and interagency cooperation. They provide insights and progress analyses of policies aligning with global development goals.

82.title: Statelessness and Displacement in Population Studies
82.description: These reports address challenges and rights concerning stateless individuals and internally displaced persons, focusing on statistical measures and electoral participation.

They highlight data compendiums and analytical frameworks established for global and comparative benchmarking.

93.description: This cluster includes reports that focus on various aspects of global economic growth, social progress, and sustainable development efforts, as presented and reviewed in sessions of UN bodies, particularly the General Assembly and Economic and Social Council.

94.description: This cluster includes reports focusing on sessions, congresses, and follow-up actions related to United Nations initiatives on crime prevention and criminal justice, covering activities of relevant committees and the Economic and Social Council.

97.description: This cluster comprises reports related to the Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women, including sessional summaries, committee considerations, and pre-sessional working group reports spanning from 2019 through 2025.

98.description: This cluster encompasses reports focusing on international efforts to promote and enhance sustainable development, economic growth, and socio-economic cooperation, addressing challenges such as debt sustainability, trade, policy frameworks, and rights-based approaches.

101.description: This cluster of UN reports discusses initiatives, dialogues, and policy developments to promote human rights and sustainable development, emphasizing themes like the right to development, participation in public affairs, and the intersection with poverty eradication, gender equity, and social integration.

102.description: This cluster comprises official reports from various UN human rights committees, documenting the proceedings, conclusions, and recommendations of their sessions held across multiple years.

103.description: This cluster includes reports from various UN committees related to organizational and administrative functions, including sessions, program coordination, information dissemination, conference patterns, and agenda management within the UN system.

104.description: This cluster consists of reports generated by various entities within the United Nations system, addressing regional situations, humanitarian efforts, and human rights conditions across different areas including South Sudan, Somalia, Afghanistan, the Sahel region, and Central Africa.

105.description: These reports focus on the activities of United Nations specialized agencies and other international institutions concerning the implementation of the Declaration on Granting Independence and promoting sustainable and resilient tourism in specific regions.

106.description: This cluster encompasses reports focusing on the control measures, implementation efforts, and policy recommendations pertaining to narcotic drugs and psychotropic substances, highlighting adherence to international agreements.

107.title: Climate Change and Human Rights Reports
107.description: This cluster comprises United Nations reports focusing on the interrelation between climate change, its impacts, and human rights, providing analyses and recommendations for advancing sustainable development and environmental justice.

108.title: Digital Innovations for Socioeconomic Development
108.description: This cluster of reports explores the role and influence of digital technologies and innovations in achieving sustainable socioeconomic development goals and upholding fundamental human rights, including education, health, and social equality.

109.title: UN Reports on Situation in Haiti
109.description: This cluster encompasses reports and communications addressing the human rights, political, and operational circumstances in Haiti, highlighting international efforts and recommendations by the United Nations.

110.title: Reports of the Committee on NGOs
110.description: Reports documenting the sessions of the Committee on Non-Governmental Organizations, detailing matters discussed and recommendations made during their regular and resumed sessions.

111.title: Committee Reports on Organizational Meetings
111.description: This cluster includes reports from UN committees on their respective sessions where key organizational matters and operational topics were addressed.

112.title: Environmental and Development UN Initiatives
112.description: This cluster encompasses reports detailing discussions, progress, and outcomes from UN forums and bodies addressing sustainable development, biodiversity, and forestry, pivotal for global cooperation and environmental stewardship.

113.title: Reports on UN Communication Activities
113.description: This cluster contains reports addressing the activities, evaluations, and objectives of the United Nations Department of Global Communications, including areas like multilingualism, conference patterns, outreach, strategic communications, and news services.

114.title: Reports on Cluster Munitions Agreements and Actions
114.description: This cluster contains reports related to disarmament affairs, focusing particularly on the Convention on Cluster Munitions and its associated annual and progress reports that track implementation of international treaties and action plans.

115.title: United Nations Environmental Policy Reports
115.description: These documents are United Nations reports focusing on environmental conservation, sustainable development initiatives, and actions mandated by specific resolutions, highlighting global efforts towards environmental governance.

116.title: United Nations Fund and Assistance Reports
116.description: This cluster of UN reports details the operations, status, and activities of various voluntary funds and assistance programs coordinated by UN bodies, demonstrating the organization's efforts in addressing global needs under specific focused areas.

117.title: Private Sector Role in Arab SDG Goals
117.description: This cluster includes reports focusing on the involvement of the private sector in achieving Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) within the Arab region, highlighting areas such as innovation, skills development, and regional impacts.

118.title: Reports on Enforced Disappearances
118.description: This cluster comprises official United Nations reports addressing the issue of enforced or involuntary disappearances, including frameworks, state compliance, and specific case investigations.

119.title: Human Rights and Business Interactions
119.description: The reports in this cluster address the intersection of human rights and business operations, focusing on the implementation and practical application of the Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights, corporate responsibility, and the role of businesses in respecting and facilitating human rights globally.

120.title: Human Rights of Persons with Albinism
120.description: Reports addressing the challenges, protection, and rights of individuals with albinism, featuring mandate achievements, thematic issues, and country-specific analyses.

121.title: Unilateral Coercive Measures and Human Rights
121.description: Reports addressing the impacts, deliberations, and legal perspectives related to unilateral coercive measures on global human rights, including assessments from special rapporteurs and panel discussions.

122.title: Gender-based Violence and Legal Frameworks
122.description: These reports examine issues of gender-based violence, particularly rape as a human rights violation and crime, and discuss appropriate legislative and digital measures for prevention and accountability.

123.title: Reports on Child Exploitation and Rights
123.description: This cluster groups reports focusing on combating the sale, exploitation, and abuse of children, and includes observations, state responses, and compliance reports related to international conventions on child protection.

124.title: Achieving Sustainable Goals Through Sport
124.description: This cluster of reports explores the integral role of sports in advancing peace, sustainable development, and social inclusion as recognized by United Nations initiatives.

125.title: Youth and Rights in Global Perspectives
125.description: These reports focus on the rights, challenges, and roles of youth and civil society in human rights and governance globally. They address issues like youth engagement, participation, and responses to crises such as COVID-19.

126.title: Human Rights in Law Enforcement Contexts
126.description: These reports explore the promotion and protection of human rights concerning police practices, focusing on addressing violations such as excessive use of force, ensuring accountability, and safeguarding fundamental freedoms in detention and assembly contexts.

127.title: Mercenary Impacts on Human Rights
127.description: These reports by the Working Group on the Use of Mercenaries investigate the consequences of mercenary activities and associated entities on human rights and self-determination, focusing on justice, accountability, and recruitment practices.

128.title: Human Rights in Afghanistan Reports
128.description: This cluster encompasses reports analyzing the human rights situation in Afghanistan, emphasizing women's rights, discrimination issues, and legal frameworks, as presented by the UN entities, including the OHCHR and Special Rapporteur.

129.title: Justice Systems and Human Rights Reports
129.description: This cluster encompasses reports focusing on the administration of justice, the independence and protection of judicial authorities, access to justice, and related human rights considerations, emphasizing the role of legal frameworks and challenges in various countries.

130.title: Freedom of Assembly and Association Reports
130.description: This cluster comprises reports by the Special Rapporteur on the Rights to Freedom of Peaceful Assembly and of Association, addressing themes such as access to resources, the impact of political cycles, strategies to protect civic space, and country-specific assessments.

131.title: Education and Human Rights Initiatives Analysis
131.description: This cluster contains reports and evaluations associated with global and national efforts initiated and supported by the United Nations to improve and assess the state of education considered a fundamental human right for all individuals, emphasizing inclusivity, equity, and accessibility.

132.title: Transitional Justice and Human Rights Reports
132.description: This cluster encompasses reports addressing issues of transitional justice, human rights violations, and restorative mechanisms to ensure truth, justice, reparation, and non-recurrence. It also includes assessments related to enforced disappearances, impacts on specific communities, and international legal principles.

133.title: Racial Equality and Minority Rights
133.description: This cluster of reports collectively addresses racism, racial discrimination, xenophobia, and the rights and empowerment of national, ethnic, religious, and linguistic minorities, as well as efforts towards the implementation of related UN declarations and programs, particularly focusing on the Durban Declaration and Programme of Action.

134.title: National Human Rights Institutions Activities
134.description: Reports focusing on the roles, accreditation processes, and contributions of national institutions, including the Global Alliance of National Human Rights Institutions and Ombudsman offices, in promoting and protecting human rights globally.

135.title: Human Rights Enhancement and Coordination
135.description: This cluster covers reports focusing on the coordination, promotion, and enhancement of human rights protection, capacity building, and response to global challenges, in line with international agreements and the United Nations' objectives.

136.title: Human Rights in the Marshall Islands
136.description: This cluster examines the human rights concerns within the Marshall Islands, particularly focusing on impacts from historical nuclear activities and issues affecting internally displaced persons.

137.title: Human Rights and Migration Dynamics
137.description: This cluster consists of reports focusing on the interrelation between human rights, migration, and issues such as labor, trafficking, and the socio-political factors affecting migrants' communities at a global level.

138.title: Addressing Gender-Based Violence and Inequality
138.description: This cluster includes reports focusing on the adverse impacts of child, early, and forced marriage and related gender-based violence, emphasizing the protection, promotion, and realization of women's and girls' human rights worldwide.

139.title: Human Rights to Water and Sanitation
139.description: This cluster encompasses reports primarily authored by Special Rapporteurs, focusing on the realization and challenges associated with safe drinking water and sanitation as fundamental human rights. The documents explore specific regional case studies, thematic analyses, and progress evaluations over defined periods.

140.title: Access to Health and COVID-19 Responses
140.description: Reports in this cluster collectively focus on global strategies, challenges, and practices related to ensuring equitable access to healthcare, medicines, and vaccines, and include assessments of the human rights implications of the COVID-19 pandemic.

141.title: Climate Change and Human Rights Impacts
141.description: This cluster focuses on the intersection of climate change effects, human rights impacts, and strategies for addressing challenges faced by vulnerable groups, emphasizing housing, displacement, and equity.

142.title: Human Rights in Occupied Palestinian Territories
142.description: This cluster comprises reports addressing human rights issues in the Occupied Palestinian Territory, including East Jerusalem. Topics include accountability for violations of international law, the humanitarian impact of settlements, and findings from relevant UN bodies.

143.title: Reports on Trafficking and Related Human Rights
143.description: This cluster comprises reports addressing trafficking in persons, particularly women and children, alongside associated human rights dimensions such as internal displacement, migrant protection, and exploitation prevention.

144.title: Working Group Specialized Session Reports
144.description: This cluster includes reports from UN Working Groups addressing findings, cases, and thematic frameworks, primarily focusing on Arbitrary Detention and Enforced or Involuntary Disappearances from their defined sessions.

145.title: Reports on Human Rights Defenders
145.description: This cluster consists of reports presented by the UN Special Rapporteur on the situation of Human Rights Defenders, emphasizing their roles, challenges faced, and continuing contributions to global human rights efforts, including field visits and thematic analyses.

146.title: Adequate Housing and Homelessness Reports
146.description: This cluster encompasses United Nations reports focusing on issues of homelessness, housing rights, and the living conditions framework, including studies conducted by Special Rapporteurs and the Secretary-General.

147.title: Corrigendums for Special Rapporteur Reports
147.description: A collection of corrigendums for reports issued by various UN Special Rapporteurs and Experts addressing human rights and social issues.

148.title: United Nations Governance and Protection Reports
148.description: This cluster comprises reports focused on United Nations practices and initiatives related to governance, prevention of atrocities, human rights protection, peacekeeping, and addressing sexual exploitation and abuse, reflecting a system-wide commitment to global development and security.

149.title: Reports on Racial Equity Initiatives
149.description: These reports discuss various efforts, investigations, and recommendations concerning racial equity, justice, and the protection of human rights, particularly focusing on issues affecting individuals of African descent and addressing systemic discrimination and racism in different national contexts.

150.title: Casualty Recording and Civilian Impact
150.description: This cluster focuses on reports by the UN High Commissioner for Human Rights addressing the recording of civilian casualties and its role in promoting and protecting human rights globally.

151.title: Reports on the Right to Development
151.description: This cluster includes reports by the Special Rapporteur on the Right to Development, focusing on national-level action on climate change, pandemic responses, and overarching principles of development rights.

152.title: Efforts to Combat Glorification of Nazism
152.description: These reports discuss the efforts and strategies required to counteract the glorification of Nazism, neo-Nazism, and other practices contributing to contemporary racism, xenophobia, and discrimination, presented by the Special Rapporteur on Contemporary Forms of Racism.

153.title: Reports on United Nations Commemorations
153.description: These reports detail United Nations initiatives to commemorate significant events, promote international awareness, and provide support for affected communities.

154.title: Human Rights Communications Reports
154.description: This cluster contains periodic reports published by the UN Special Procedures Mechanisms detailing communications sent to state and non-state actors regarding alleged human rights violations, along with responses received from these entities over defined timeframes.

155.title: Reports with Corrections from UN Working Groups
155.description: These reports are corrigenda issued by various United Nations working groups to address errors or omissions in their previously released documents, emphasizing transparency and accuracy.

156.title: Human Rights of Minority Groups
156.description: These reports, authored by the Special Rapporteur on Minority Issues, address various aspects of protecting and promoting the rights of minorities, including conflict prevention, representation, education, and social inclusion.

157.title: Conscientious Objection Rights Analysis
157.description: These reports analyze the theme of conscientious objection to military service, documenting international human rights perspectives and legal frameworks as assessed by the OHCHR.

159.description: These reports collectively examine the humanitarian conditions, internally displaced persons, and international cooperation efforts related to Georgia, including visits from independent experts and analyses by the United Nations.

These reports aim to address violations, implement resolutions, and guide the promotion and protection of human rights.

162.description: This cluster of reports explores various aspects of cultural rights, including their interaction with societal challenges such as migration, digitalization, and cultural diversity, as well as country-specific analyses and visits by the Special Rapporteur.

164.description: This cluster of UN reports addresses human rights issues related to detention practices, prison management, and the prevention of torture. It includes periodic reviews, country visits, and thematic analyses designed to ensure compliance with international standards such as the United Nations Standard Minimum Rules for the Treatment of Prisoners.

184.description: Reports focusing on examining migration-related human rights issues, exploring violations, prevention, accountability, and field visits to assess conditions for migrants in various countries.

185.title: Human Rights and Armed Conflicts
185.description: This cluster of reports addresses the impact of arms transfers, mercenary activities, and private military engagements on human rights, as well as the implications on natural resource exploitation, arms trafficking, and regional assessments.

188.description: This cluster contains reports addressing human rights matters within Southeast Asia, focusing on specific nations such as the Philippines and Thailand. 193.description: This cluster comprises reports discussing the activities, proceedings, and outcomes of various United Nations councils, committees, and working groups across different sessions, emphasizing governance, human rights, trade, and development.

194.description: This cluster encompasses reports addressing the issue of Israeli settlements in the Occupied Palestinian Territory and the occupied Syrian Golan, focusing on their implications and related concerns.

196.description: These reports examine international systemic structures and trends impacting economic development and equity, addressing global inequalities and sustainable growth.

203.title: Protection and Accountability in International Law

205.title: Reports on Cyprus Peace and Human Rights
205.description: This cluster comprises reports from the United Nations focusing on the political situation, mission initiatives, peacebuilding efforts, and human rights conditions in Cyprus.

206.title: UN Periodic and Special Procedure Reports
206.description: This cluster contains periodic submissions and special reports delivered by UN entities or state parties under human rights agreements and conventions, emphasizing the promotion of truth, justice, and human rights analysis.

207.title: Advisory Committee Session Reports
207.description: This cluster contains reports detailing the proceedings and outcomes of the 30th and 33rd sessions of the Advisory Committee of the Human Rights Council, addressing various human rights matters discussed during these sessions.

208.title: Human Rights Issues in African Nations

209.title: Human Rights Council Special Session Reports
209.description: This cluster includes reports from the Human Rights Council documenting deliberations and resolutions during its 33rd and 37th special sessions.

210.title: Reports on Human Rights and State Obligations

211.description: This cluster includes reports centered on the comments provided by the Finnish State concerning the visit and analysis conducted by the Independent Expert on the enjoyment of all human rights by older persons in Finland, including subsequent corrections.

212.title: State Responses to Expert Reports on Aging

213.description: This cluster contains reports that compile comments by States in response to reports by UN human rights experts, focusing on specific human rights issues or country visits.

214.title: Human Rights Investigation in Conflict Zones
214.description: This cluster encompasses reports detailing investigations and findings by independent UN experts and missions on the human rights situations and violations in various regions affected by conflict or political instability, such as Libya, Sudan, Ethiopia, Eritrea, and Yemen.

215.title: Human Rights in Conflict Zones
215.description: This cluster focuses on reports examining human rights conditions and violations in regions experiencing conflict, with specific case studies on Syria and Myanmar.

216.title: Human Rights in Ukraine and Crimea
216.description: This cluster of reports focuses on the examination and documentation of human rights conditions within the territories of Ukraine, including the Autonomous Republic of Crimea and the city of Sevastopol, highlighting situations of occupation and key findings from visits by UN Special Rapporteurs and other bodies.

217.title: Human Rights in the Islamic Republic of Iran
217.description: This cluster comprises reports addressing the situation of human rights in the Islamic Republic of Iran, providing analyses, findings, and recommendations by UN bodies and experts to address observed shortcomings and promote human rights standards.

218.title: Reports on Judicial Mechanism and Oversight
218.description: This cluster encompasses reports addressing the operations, financing, and evaluation of international judicial mechanisms, focusing on accountability and procedural review.

219.title: Country Visits on Human Rights Issues
219.description: This cluster focuses on United Nations reports documenting investigations during country visits by experts to assess specific human rights concerns, offering evaluated insights and recommendations to address findings.

220.title: Special Rapporteur Visit Reports

221.title: Human Rights in the European Union
221.description: This cluster contains reports focusing on human rights issues within the European Union, with an emphasis on topics such as extreme poverty, rights of persons with disabilities, and treaty obligations. They include assessments, country visits, feedback, and periodic submissions.

222.title: Special Rapporteur Visits to Hungary
222.description: This cluster contains reports concerning the visits of Special Rapporteurs to Hungary, including their analyses and the Hungarian State's comments. Each report focuses on the thematic areas of freedom of religion, belief, and opinion.

223.title: State Comments on Rapporteurs' Brazil Visits
223.description: This cluster contains reports that present the comments provided by the State of Brazil following the visits of UN Special Rapporteurs. These documents address specific rights and societal issues discussed during the missions, reflecting the State's perspectives and responses.

224.title: Human Rights in Denmark and Greenland
224.description: This cluster includes reports examining human rights issues in Denmark and Greenland, with a focus on Indigenous Peoples and international solidarity, authored by UN-appointed experts during their official visits.

225.title: Special Rapporteur Visit to Japan
225.description: This cluster includes reports that document the visit of the Special Rapporteur on the Human Rights of Internally Displaced Persons, Cecilia Jimenez-Damary, to Japan and encompass her observations and recommendations alongside comments by the State.

226.title: Special Rapporteur Visits to Poland

377.description: This cluster contains financial reports associated with meetings and conferences related to the Treaty on the Prohibition of Nuclear Weapons and the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons, detailing their respective financial aspects.

378.title: Future of Global Environment Outlook
378.description: These reports discuss the evaluation and strategic planning concerning the Global Environment Outlook's ongoing and future editions by the designated Steering Committee.

379.title: Meetings on Continental Shelf Commission Elections
379.description: These reports document the proceedings of resumed meetings of State Parties under the United Nations Convention on the Law of the Sea for electing members to the Commission on the Limits of the Continental Shelf.

380.title: Convention on Biological Diversity Meetings
380.description: These reports document proceedings and outcomes of various meetings conducted under the Convention on Biological Diversity and its protocols, focusing on biodiversity conservation, genetic resource usage, and sustainable development.

381.title: Reports on the Treaty on Nuclear Prohibition
381.description: These documents analyze and discuss various aspects of the Treaty on the Prohibition of Nuclear Weapons, including state security concerns, scientific evaluations, and updates presented during meetings of States Parties.

382.title: Technology Bank Council Session Reports
382.description: This cluster comprises reports detailing the proceedings and outcomes of multiple sessions of the Council of the Technology Bank for the Least Developed Countries, focusing on progress towards enhancing science, technology, and innovation in these nations.

383.title: Management and Administration Review Reports
383.description: This cluster consists of reports by the Joint Inspection Unit reviewing the management and administrative practices within specific United Nations organizations, aiming to enhance operational efficiency and effectiveness.

384.title: World Investment Reports Overview
384.description: This cluster contains overviews of the annual 'World Investment Reports,' emphasizing global investment trends and their implications amid current economic challenges.

385.title: World Investment Report 2023
385.description: This cluster includes reports centered on the theme of investing in sustainable energy as explored in the 2023 edition of the UN's World Investment Report.

386.title: Assessment of Specific Security Benchmarks
386.description: These reports focus on evaluating progress toward established benchmarks related to UN Security Council resolutions concerning peace and security in specific regions or situations, with attention to compliance and impact.

387.title: Credentials for UN Security Council Delegates
387.description: These reports consist of submissions and assessments of credentials for various representatives, deputy representatives, and alternate representatives of member states serving in the capacity of United Nations Security Council delegates, outlining their official appointments in adherence to UN procedures.

388.title: Implementation of Resolution 1956 (2010)
388.description: These reports submitted by the Secretary-General detail the implementation progress related to paragraph 6 of resolution 1956 (2010), providing regular updates.

389.title: Reports by the Secretary-General on Mandate Implementation
389.description: This cluster includes reports provided by the UN Secretary-General regarding the execution and progress of mandates established by Security Council resolutions, encompassing both specific clause implementations and peacekeeping operations.

390.title: Security Council Resolution Implementation Reports
390.description: These reports provide updates and analysis on the implementation of Security Council resolutions 1559 (2004) and 1701 (2006), as prepared by the Secretary-General in adherence to stipulated reporting intervals.

391.title: Security Council Committee Reports
391.description: This cluster contains official communications from the Chairs of various Security Council Committees to the President of the Security Council, providing updates on their respective mandates in addressing specific international situations.

392.title: Panel of Experts Final Reports
392.description: This cluster includes corrigenda of final reports from UN Panels of Experts established to monitor compliance with Security Council resolutions in relation to Libya and Yemen.

393.title: Subcommittee on Prevention of Torture Reports
393.description: This cluster consists of reports by the Subcommittee on Prevention of Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment, detailing its annual activities, visits to member states, and observations or recommendations to strengthen national mechanisms against torture.

394.title: State Periodic Reports on UN Conventions
394.description: This cluster comprises periodic reports submitted by member states in compliance with their obligations under various United Nations conventions to detail steps taken to implement treaty provisions.

395.title: Periodic Reports by States Parties
395.description: This cluster encompasses periodic reports submitted by member states to the UN treaty bodies as required under specific international conventions to report on measures adopted and progress made in implementing treaty provisions.

396.title: State Submissions Under the CAT Convention
396.description: Reports submitted by member states under Article 19 of the Convention against Torture, detailing their adherence and implementation efforts.

397.title: Periodic Reports Submitted by Brazil
397.description: These reports consist of Brazil's formal submissions to various United Nations conventions and protocols, detailing its implementation and compliance with international treaty obligations related to human rights.

398.title: Periodic State Reports on Human Rights
398.description: These reports comprise state-submitted periodic updates under UN conventions, adhering to stipulated reporting procedures, demonstrating their compliance and implementation efforts concerning human rights obligations.

399.title: Periodic Reports on Convention Against Torture
399.description: This cluster contains periodic reports submitted by Member States under Article 19 of the Convention Against Torture, including corrigenda, detailing compliance with the Convention's obligations.

400.title: Periodic Reports to Convention Against Torture
400.description: This cluster contains periodic reports submitted by Germany and Liechtenstein under Article 19 of the Convention Against Torture, detailing measures taken to prevent torture and other cruel, inhuman, or degrading treatment.

401.title: Israel's State Party Reports on Conventions
401.description: This cluster encompasses periodic and common core reports submitted by Israel concerning its obligations and implementation of international human rights conventions, as required by treaty bodies under the UN framework.

402.title: Periodic Reports under UN Human Rights Treaties
402.description: The reports in this cluster are periodic submissions by state parties under the Convention against Torture and the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights, focusing on compliance and implementation of treaty provisions.

403.title: Periodic Reports by the Russian Federation
403.description: This cluster includes periodic state reports submitted by the Russian Federation to fulfill its obligations under international human rights conventions.

404.title: USA's Human Rights Treaty Reports
404.description: This cluster comprises reports submitted by the United States of America to fulfill its obligations under various international human rights treaties, addressing adherence to specific protocols and conventions.

405.title: State Party Initial and Periodic Reports
405.description: This cluster comprises reports submitted by State parties under various UN human rights conventions and covenants, detailing adherence and measures taken to comply with treaty obligations.

406.title: India's Compliance with Human Rights Treaties
406.description: Reports submitted by India outlining the country's adherence to international human rights treaties, focusing on specific conventions and treaties to which it is a State Party.

407.title: Periodic State Compliance Reports under ICCPR and ICERD
407.description: This cluster contains various periodic reports submitted by states under their commitments to the International Covenant on Civil and Political Rights (ICCPR) and the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination (ICERD), highlighting the reporting states' adherence to and implementation progress of these treaties.

408.title: State Reports on International Human Rights
408.description: This cluster includes reports submitted by state parties, Zambia and Zimbabwe, under the frameworks of international human rights instruments and the associated covenants, reflecting their obligations and implementations within outlined reporting guidelines.

409.title: Follow-Up to Human Rights Committee Observations
409.description: This cluster contains reports documenting the actions and updates regarding the follow-up to the Human Rights Committee's concluding observations and recommendations.

410.title: States' Reports on Enforced Disappearances
410.description: This cluster comprises reports and corrigenda submitted by States parties under Article 29(1) of the International Convention for the Protection of All Persons from Enforced Disappearance. These documents relate to reports due in 2012 and 2013 from various countries regarding actions and compliance with the Convention.

411.title: Periodic Reports on Human Rights Conventions
411.description: This cluster contains state parties' periodic reports submitted under respective articles of UN Human Rights Conventions, outlining measures implemented and progress made towards fulfilling their obligations.

412.title: Periodic Reports on Anti-Discrimination Conventions
412.description: These reports represent periodic submissions by nations under UN anti-discrimination conventions, specifically addressing commitments to eliminate racial and gender discrimination as per international agreements.

413.title: CEDAW Periodic Reports Submission
413.description: Reports submitted by nations to the UN under Article 18 of the Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination Against Women (CEDAW), outlining their progress and compliance.

414.title: Periodic Reports on Racial Discrimination
414.description: This cluster includes state reports submitted under Article 9 of the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination, detailing measures taken by member states to implement the Convention.

415.title: Reports for ICERD under Article 9
415.description: This cluster consists of periodic and initial reports submitted by various UN member states under Article 9 of the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination (ICERD). These reports are prepared by signatory states to demonstrate compliance and progress in combatting racial discrimination.

416.title: New Zealand's 2021 Convention Reports
416.description: This cluster contains periodic reports submitted by New Zealand to fulfill its obligations under international conventions addressing racial discrimination and children's rights, as stipulated for the reporting year 2021.

417.title: State Party Reports on UN Conventions
417.description: This cluster includes State Party reports submitted under specific articles of UN conventions, detailing measures taken to comply with treaty obligations. These reports ensure accountability and transparency in human rights adherence.

418.title: State Reports Submission Status Overview
418.description: These documents provide updates on the submission statuses of periodic reports by State parties per Article 9 (1) of the International Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Racial Discrimination, as prepared by the Secretary-General.

419.title: Reports on Child Involvement in Armed Conflict
419.description: These reports, submitted under Article 8 (1) of the Optional Protocol to the Convention on the Rights of the Child, address measures taken by member states to prevent and mitigate the involvement of children in armed conflict.

420.title: CRPD Periodic Reports by Member States
420.description: This cluster contains combined periodic reports submitted by member states under Article 35 of the Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities, detailing their compliance and progress in implementing the Convention's provisions.

421.title: Reports on Convention on Disabilities
421.description: This cluster consists of reports and corrigenda produced under the Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities, highlighting national and international assessments and inquiries.

422.title: Reports on Human Rights Instruments
422.description: This cluster includes core documents from States parties, providing essential information on the implementation of international human rights treaties. The reports pertain to Australia and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland.

423.title: States Parties Human Rights Core Documents
423.description: This cluster includes common core documents submitted by various states under international human rights instruments as part of their treaty reporting obligations.

424.title: State Reports on Human Rights Instruments
424.description: These reports are common core documents provided by States parties, detailing their compliance with international human rights treaties and frameworks.

425.title: Common Core Documents of State Parties
425.description: These documents represent the common core reports submitted by Lithuania and Serbia as part of their obligations under the international human rights instruments, outlining national frameworks and measures taken to implement human rights.

426.title: Subcommittee's Preventive Visits Reports
426.description: These documents detail the observations and recommendations by the Subcommittee on Prevention of Torture and Other Cruel, Inhuman or Degrading Treatment or Punishment following their visits to Hungary in March 2017 and Poland in July 2018, specifically addressing the National Preventive Mechanisms (NPM).

427.title: Subcommittee Visit Reports: Switzerland 2019
427.description: This cluster comprises reports by the Subcommittee on Prevention of Torture detailing the findings and recommendations from its visit to Switzerland in early 2019, including assessments directed towards the national preventive mechanism and the State party.
